hero.description: Your toolkit to stop configuring and start innovating. Securely build, deploy, and scale the best experiences.

features.title: Everything you need.
features.subtitle: Nothing you don't.
features.deployDesc: Push to production in seconds. Our edge network ensures your applications load instantly, anywhere in the world.
features.aiDesc: Build intelligent applications with built-in AI capabilities. From inference to training, everything scales automatically.
features.collabDesc: Work together seamlessly. Live preview, instant feedback, and version control that actually makes sense.
features.securityDesc: Bank-grade encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and granular access controls. Your data stays yours.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.footer: Need more details? {compare} or contact our team.

howItWorks.title: Three steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: Infinite possibilities.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Integrate with your existing stack in minutes. We support 200+ data sources out of the box.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Design powerful automations with our visual builder or write code directly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Deploy globally with zero configuration. Your app goes live in under 30 seconds.

infrastructure.title: Global by
infrastructure.description: Deploy once, run everywhere. Our edge network spans 17 data centers across 6 continents, delivering sub-50ms latency to 99% of the world.

footer.description: The platform for teams who ship. Build, deploy, and scale with unprecedented velocity.
